summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
mydentist.co.uk is a UK-wide dental care provider offering both NHS and private dentistry, including routine care, cosmetic treatments (whitening, implants, aligners, composite bonding), and a dental plan. Their Cambridge practice on Chesterton Road is currently accepting new patients.

## Key Details

**Company:** mydentist (mydentist.co.uk)  
**Location (Cambridge practice):** Chesterton Road, Cambridge  
**Contact:** Phone 01223 319787 | Online contact form via website  
**Services Offered:**
- NHS dentistry (clinically necessary care)
- Affordable private dentistry (myoptions)
- Premium private dentistry (including cosmetic treatments)
- Dental implants
- Teeth whitening & composite bonding
- Dentures / Bridges
- Dental hygiene
- Teeth straightening (clear aligners, Invisalign, teen orthodontics, metal/ceramic braces)
- Facial aesthetics (line & wrinkle treatments)
- Emergency dental care
- Dental finance / Pay in 3

**Patient Intake:** Enquire online or book directly; open to new patients.
